narrative: New deliveries in South End slowed meaningfully in Q4 2025 as four class-A projects delayed to mid-2026 due to financing rewets. Expect lease-up concessions to compress from 1.5 mo to 0.75 mo by Q3 2026.
author: Priya Iyer

narrative: Concession offerings expanded across luxury Midtown comps with 1.5 months free becoming modal versus 1.0 in Q4 2025. Middle-market comps held steady at 0.5 to 1.0 months.
author: Priya Iyer

narrative: North Hills absorption remained healthy at 14 units per month per comp despite Q4 2025 supply. Rent growth of 3.2 percent trailing 3 months outpaces peer submarkets.
author: Marcus Wen

narrative: Property insurance premiums up 22 percent year-over-year in coastal Florida; expect 50 to 80 bps impact on operating margins for Westshore comps until market stabilizes.
author: Jordan Park
